issue: The add function returns the wrong result because it subtracts instead of adds.
The multiply function always returns zero regardless of input.
The is_even function returns True for odd numbers and False for even numbers — the logic is inverted.
The get_first_element function crashes with IndexError on empty lists instead of returning None.
The celsius_to_fahrenheit function uses the wrong formula and returns incorrect temperatures.
The count_words function counts characters instead of words.
The fibonacci function returns incorrect values because the base cases are wrong.
The flatten_list function only flattens one level deep instead of fully flattening nested lists.
The binary_search function always returns -1 because the comparison operators are wrong.
The remove_duplicates function removes all occurrences of duplicate values instead of keeping one.
The is_palindrome function fails on strings with spaces and mixed case like 'Race car'.
The group_by function groups items incorrectly — it overwrites existing groups instead of appending to them.
The calculate_grade function has off-by-one errors in the grade boundaries.
The merge_sorted_lists function fails when one list is empty and produces wrong order on equal elements.
The parse_csv_line function incorrectly handles quoted fields containing commas.
The LRU cache implementation evicts the wrong item — it removes the most recently used instead of least recently used.
The tokenizer function fails on edge cases: empty strings, multiple spaces, and strings with only punctuation.
The graph depth-first search returns nodes in wrong order and misses disconnected components.
The rate limiter allows too many requests through because it uses the wrong time window calculation.
The expression evaluator incorrectly handles operator precedence for mixed addition and multiplication.
